Dear colleagues,

Thank you for joining our high-energy rollout kick-off for Claude Code!

Here are links to the kick-off ​ slides​ and recording.

3. Start using Claude Code!

If you need help, please reach out to us via the Claude Code Support channel.


Enjoy AI-assisted coding with Claude Code!
